description_long: This is a classic ring-shaped donut with a golden-brown, slightly matte dough exterior and a thick, glossy chocolate glaze covering the top half. The chocolate glaze is adorned with colorful, elongated sprinkles in pink, yellow, and green, adding a playful and appetizing touch. The donut has a smooth, rounded profile with a central hole, and the glaze appears to have a slight sheen, indicating a fresh, sugary coating. The bottom of the donut is unglazed, showing the soft, baked dough texture. The overall appearance suggests a freshly made, bakery-style treat, likely soft to the touch with a slightly firm outer crust. The donut is unwrapped and presented against a plain background, emphasizing its appetizing features.
description: A golden-brown ring donut topped with glossy chocolate glaze and colorful sprinkles, showing a soft, fresh-baked texture.
description_view_0: Top view showing the chocolate glaze with colorful sprinkles and a shiny highlight, revealing the donut's central hole.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the donut's rounded, golden-brown edge and the thickness of the glaze on the upper half.
description_view_2: Bottom view revealing the unglazed, soft dough surface and the central hole, with no toppings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the smooth, golden-brown edge and a partial glimpse of the glazed top.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze with a glossy, smooth finish
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped, isolated on a plain background
